# FireRed Stream-VAD ONNX Assets

This directory contains the FireRed Stream-VAD assets used by Funyi's default
realtime speech gate:

- `fireredvad_stream_vad_with_cache.onnx`
- `cmvn.ark`

They are copied from FireRedTeam/FireRedVAD commit
`c30ec49e8cc69642b0ee65362eba11b9d11c6e54`,
`pretrained_models/onnx_models/`.

Source:

- https://github.com/FireRedTeam/FireRedVAD

License:

- Apache License, Version 2.0. See `../../LICENSES/Apache-2.0.txt`.

  - sha256: `b3c97836130dc34fc32d56fab551e88cf9454511de2b3c250a5e6578dee74b93`
- `cmvn.ark`
